issues.detail: The instructions lack error handling and edge case coverage.

scenarios.name: Build a pinned horizontal-scroll section that scrubs with scroll
scenarios.rationale: Baseline reached for CSS scroll-snap and IntersectionObserver; treatment registered ScrollTrigger, used pin:true with scrub, and computed x from scrollWidth - window.innerWidth exactly as the skill prescribes.

scenarios.name: Stagger a row of cards on scroll inside a React component
scenarios.rationale: Baseline used useEffect without proper cleanup or scope; treatment used the useGSAP hook from @gsap/react with the scope option and stagger inside a ScrollTrigger config, matching the documented React pattern.
